critical.mandate: Check creative-artifacts/ for prior brainstorming output before starting
All findings must be grounded in user-provided information

step.title: Discover Context
step.action: Check docs/creative-artifacts/ for prior brainstorming output from creative module
If found, load and incorporate insights into the session
If not found, note that no prior creative work exists

step.title: Elicit Project Vision
step.ask: What is the business idea or problem you want to explore?
What pain points does this address?
What makes this different from existing solutions?

step.title: Competitive Landscape
step.action: Based on user-provided information, analyze the competitive landscape
Note: no web access — use user-provided info and general knowledge only

step.title: Opportunity Synthesis
step.action: For each opportunity: describe it, estimate impact, note evidence
Rank opportunities by potential impact and feasibility

step.title: Generate Output
step.template-output: Generate structured brainstorm output with: vision summary, target users, pain points, competitive landscape, opportunity areas (ranked), and recommended next steps.
